title: Faithfull Sledge Hammer Replacement Handle – FSC® Certified Hickory Wood with Wax Finish – 915mm (36in)
features: Premium Hickory Wood Construction – Made from straight-grained, hard-wearing hickory for maximum, strength, durability and shock absorption.
FSC 100% Certified Wood – Sourced responsibly from well-managed forests, this heavy-duty handle is ideal for both professionals and DIY users who demand toughness and sustainability in their tools.
Comfortable Waxed Finish – The smooth waxed surface ensures a firm, comfortable grip and helps resist wear over time.
Reliable 36 Inch Length – At 915mm (36 inches), this handle offers the perfect balance of leverage and control for heavy-duty striking tasks.
Eye Size of 32 x 26mm – Designed to fit sledgehammer heads with an eye size of 32 x 26mm.
description: The Faithfull Sledge Hammer Handle is a high-quality, durable replacement handle crafted from FSC® 100% certified straight-grained hickory. Designed for strength, comfort, and reliability, this 915mm (36 inch) wooden handle features a smooth waxed finish for a secure grip and long-lasting performance. Perfectly suited as a replacement handle for sledge hammers, this heavy-duty handle is ideal for both professionals and DIY users who demand toughness and sustainability in their tools. Length: 915mm (36in). Eye Size: 32 x 26mm SAFETY TIP Replacing a damaged or broken handle on a striking tool should be done with great care. Handles must always be fitted with the correct size wooden and steel wedges.
